subcodes.first_line: The Book hath been sent down by the All-Merciful unto a leaf from amongst the leaves of the Divine Lote-Tree of Utterance, that it may draw her unto a station wherein naught in the world can be seen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن لورقه من اوراق سدره البیان لیجذبها الی مقام لاتری فی العالم
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for women, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
